history.reasoning: The node exhibits multiple severe anomalies: RSRP is below the normal threshold (-118 dBm < -110 dBm), indicating weak signal strength; Packet Loss is above 2% (12%), degrading network performance; Throughput is significantly lower than expected (18 Mbps vs ~300 Mbps), suggesting poor data rates; and Failed Handovers are very high (80% > 10%), indicating frequent connectivity issues. These combined issues point to a critical state.
